block_01: If you are looking for an instrument that offers flexibility and portfolio diversification, ETFs are the way to go. Read on to find out more about ETFs, how to trade it skillfully, and be aware of the risks involved.
block_03: Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) track indices and can be composed of commodities, bonds, or baskets of assets. ETFs trade like stocks, but since they do not rely on a single asset, they can act as a way to hedge risk against market volatility.
block_05: Choose the ETF you would like to trade.
block_06: Buy the asset if you think its price will increase. Sell if you speculate it will depreciate.
block_07: Close the deal when the time is right or set up auto close.
block_08: When trading ETFs, keep in mind:
block_09: Follow the in-platform smart news feed for major events that may move an asset’s price
block_10: Use technical analysis tools to forecast potential movements
block_11: Now that you know more about ETFs, ready to give them another shot?
block_13: *Profits increase according to leverage in case of a successful investment only.
